cards.name: Hope of the Korbinites
abilities: To play this, you must discard a card.
Then, if you are [keyword:Worthy], draw a card.

cards.name: Bio-Engineered Cyborg
abilities: You may discard a card. If you do, draw a card.

cards.name: Stormbreaker
abilities: You cannot throw Stormbreaker unless you are [keyword:Worthy].
[keyword:Thrown Artifact] — To throw this, you must discard a card from your hand. Then you get +2[icon:attack] for each card you discarded from your hand this turn.

cards.name: The Warship Skuttlebutt
abilities: You may discard a card. Then count the number of cards you discarded from your hand this turn. Draw that many cards.

cards.name: Dimensional Blade
abilities: [keyword:Thrown Artifact] — When you throw this you get +1[icon:recruit] and +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Weapons Master
abilities: If you control any Artifacts, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Winged Helm
abilities: [keyword:Thrown Artifact] — You may throw this to get +1[icon:attack].
During any player's turn, if a player would gain a Wound, you may throw this to prevent that Wound and draw two cards instead.

cards.name: Golden Apples of Idunn
abilities: [keyword:Thrown Artifact] — When you throw this, you get +4[icon:attack] and you may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Test of Virtue
abilities: If you are [keyword:Worthy], you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Divine Lightning
abilities: You get +1[icon:attack] for each other card you played this turn that makes you [keyword:Worthy].

cards.name: Mjolnir
abilities: You cannot throw Mjolnir unless you are [keyword:Worthy].
[keyword:Thrown Artifact] — When you throw this, you get +3[icon:attack], then you get +1[icon:attack] for each [hc:ranged] Hero you played this turn.

cards.name: Royal Decree
abilities: [team:heroes-of-asgard]: Each player who is [keyword:Worthy] draws a card. Each Villain that isn't worth at least 5VP gets -1[icon:attack] this turn.

cards.name: Dragonfang
abilities: [keyword:Thrown Artifact] — When you throw this, you get [keyword:Sewers Conqueror 2].

cards.name: Flying Stallion
abilities: [keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
When an Ambush ability is played, before it takes effect, you may discard this card. If you do, draw two extra cards at the end of this turn.

cards.name: Usher to Valhalla
abilities: [keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[team:heroes-of-asgard]: The first time you defeat a Villain this turn, you may KO one of your cards or a card from your discard pile.

cards.name: Ride of the Valkyries
abilities: [keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[hc:instinct]: You get +1[icon:attack] for every 4 Heroes in the KO pile.

cards.name: Fandral the Dashing
abilities: You may move a Villain to an adjacent city space. If another Villain is already there, swap them.
[hc:covert]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Hogun the Grim
abilities: [hc:strength]: You may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Volstagg the Valiant
abilities: [keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[hc:instinct]: Instead, [keyword:Conqueror]

cards.name: Three Stand as One
abilities: If you played at least three other non-grey Heroes with different card names this turn, you get +3[icon:attack].
[team:heroes-of-asgard]: [keyword:Streets Conqueror 3]

cards.name: Hela, Goddess of Death
abilities: [keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 5 [keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 5
Always Leads: Omens of Ragnarok

Master Strike: This Strike enters the city as a 5[icon:attack] "Army of the Dead" Villain worth 3VP. Then choose a Villain worth 3VP or more from your Victory Pile (including an Army of the Dead) to enter the city. If you didn't have any, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Epic Hela, Goddess of Death
abilities: [keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 6 [keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 6
Always Leads: Omens of Ragnarok

Master Strike: This Strike enters the city as a 6[icon:attack] "Army of the Dead" Villain worth 4VP. Then choose a Villain worth 4VP or more from your Victory Pile (including an Army of the Dead) to enter the city. If you didn't have any, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Hela's Cloak
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. Hela captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapons].
[keyword:Artifact] - Once during each player's turn, if you would gain a Wound, you may draw a card instead.

cards.name: The Nightsword
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. Hela captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapons].
[keyword:Thrown Artifact] - When you throw this, you get [keyword:Conqueror].

cards.name: Seize Bifrost, The Rainbow Bridge
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, that Villain enters the Bridge or Streets, if one of those spaces is empty.

cards.name: Naglfar, Longship of Fingernails
abilities: Fight: The player on your right reveals the Villain from their Victory Pile that's worth the most VP. That Villain enters the Bridge or Streets, if one of those spaces is empty.

cards.name: Malekith the Accursed
abilities: Always Leads: Dark Council

Master Strike: Malekith captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] from the city or from any player's control or discard pile. Then this Master Strike enters the city as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] called “Darkspear“ that gives +2[icon:attack]. When you gain a Darkspear, it becomes a [keyword:Thrown Artifact] that gives +2[icon:attack] when thrown.

cards.name: Epic Malekith the Accursed
abilities: Always Leads: Dark Council

Master Strike: Malekith captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] from the city, then captures one from any player's control or discard pile. Then this Master Strike enters the city as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] called “Darkspear“ that gives +3[icon:attack]. When you gain a Darkspear, it becomes a [keyword:Thrown Artifact] that gives +2[icon:attack] when thrown.

cards.name: Black Hammer of the Accursed
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. Malekith captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapons] from the city or from any player's control or discard pile. Then this Tactic enters the city as a [keyword:Villainous Weapons].
[keyword:Artifact] - Once per turn, you may KO a Hero from your discard pile.

cards.name: Dagger of Living Abyss
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. Malekith captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapons] from the city or from any player's control or discard pile. Then this Tactic enters the city as a [keyword:Villainous Weapons].
[keyword:Artifact] - Once per turn, you may defeat a Villain worth 2VP or less.

cards.name: The Hunting Horn of Faerie
abilities: Fight: Rescue 4 Bystanders. Malekith captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapons] from the city or from any player's control or discard pile. Then this Tactic enters the city as a [keyword:Villainous Weapons].
[keyword:Artifact] - Once per turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Vulnerable to Cold Iron
abilities: Fight: You get +2[icon:recruit] for each [hc:tech] Hero you have.

cards.name: Laufey, Father Of Loki
abilities: Ambush: Laufey captures The Casket of Ancient Winters from any Villain, Mastermind, player's control, or discard pile.
Escape: If Laufey holds The Casket of Ancient Winters, say “Fimbulwinter has come,“ and each player discards down to 3 cards.

cards.name: The Mangog
abilities: The Mangog gets +1[icon:attack] for each Villain in the Victory Pile of the player on your right.
Escape: Each player who is not [keyword:Worthy] gains a Wound.

cards.name: Ulik, The Troll
abilities: Ulik gets +2[icon:attack] if you are not [keyword:Worthy].
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Sindr, Fire Giant Queen
abilities: Fight: If you are [keyword:Worthy], you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Jarnbjorn, First Axe of Thor
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapons]
[keyword:Thrown Artifact] When you throw this, you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: The Casket of Ancient Winters
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapons]
[keyword:Artifact] Once per turn, if you are [keyword:Worthy], you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: The Eternal Flame
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapons]
Ambush: If Surtur is in the city, he captures The Eternal Flame. If a player controls "Surtur's Crown", that card enters the city as the Villain Surtur and captures The Eternal Flame.
[keyword:Artifact] Once per turn, return a 0-cost card from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: The Hel-Crown
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapons]
[keyword:Artifact] Once per turn, you get [keyword:Conqueror].

cards.name: Skurge, The Executioner
abilities: [keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 3
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Surtur, Fire Giant King
abilities: Fight: Put this into your discard pile as a "Surtur's Crown" Artifact.
Escape: If Surtur was holding The Eternal Flame, say "Ragnarok has come", KO each [team:heroes-of-asgard] Hero from the HQ, and each player gains two Wounds.
[keyword:Artifact] Once per turn, you get [keyword:Conqueror].

cards.name: Jormungand, The World-Serpent
abilities: [keyword:Sewers] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[keyword:Bank] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[keyword:Rooftops] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
[keyword:Bridge] [keyword:Conqueror] 1
Fight: Each Hero currently in the HQ costs 1 less this turn.

cards.name: The Fenris Wolf
abilities: [keyword:Streets] [keyword:Conqueror] 2
Ambush: The Fenris Wolf moves forward to the Rooftops, pushing other Villains forward as normal.
Setup: 11 Twists.
Twist 1-7: Each player who is not [keyword:Worthy] discards a card. Then, if at least half the players (round up) are not [keyword:Worthy], put this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Moral Failing.“
Twist 8-11: Put this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Moral Failing.“
Evil Wins: When there are 5 Moral Failings.
Setup: 10 Twists.
Twist: Put this Twist next to a city space of HQ space that doesn't already have one, as “Eternal Darkness.“
Special Rules: Villains in city spaces with Eternal Darkness get +1[icon:attack]. To recruit a Hero in an HQ space with Eternal Darkness, you must pay an extra 1[icon:recruit].
Evil Wins: When all city spaces or all HQ spaces are covered in Eternal Darkness.
Setup: 9 Twists.
Twist 1-7: This Twist enters the city as a “Frost Giant Invader“ Villain worth 6VP with 6[icon:attack] and the ability “If you are not [keyword:Worthy], this gets +4[icon:attack].“
Twist 8-9: Same effect, then a Frost Giant Invader from each player's Victory Pile enters the city.
Evil Wins: When there are 5 Frost Giant Invaders in the city and/or Escape Pile.
Setup: 11 Twists.

Twist: Choose a Villain from your Victory Pile worth at least 2VP to enter the city. Then, if the total [icon:attack] of Villains in the city is at least as high as the Guardian [icon:attack] listed below, put this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Guardian Defeated.“
Twist 1: Balder, 11[icon:attack]
Twist 2: Odin, 24[icon:attack]
Twist 3: Vidar, 19[icon:attack]
Twist 4: Tyr, 16[icon:attack]
Twist 5: Heimdall, 12[icon:attack]
Twist 6: Frey, 7[icon:attack]
Twist 7: Frigga, 8[icon:attack]
Twist 8-11: Warriors of Valhalla, 6[icon:attack]
Evil Wins: When there are 5 Guardians Defeated.
